personality_one_liner: A premium, functional field-service tool combining stark white backgrounds and precise borders with a vibrant organic green accent.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical rhythm, 16pt gaps between stacked fields. Ensure minimum 48pt touch targets. Left-aligned layouts.

do's: Subtle frosted glass on the bottom tab bar
Sticky CTAs wrapped in glass container at the bottom of forms
dont's: Never use on standard content cards

screens.name: Login
screens.purpose: Role-based secure entry for Admins and Employees.

states.loading: Spinner centered on stark white background with 'Authenticating...'
states.error: Standard inline error messages below form fields in #EF4444.

screens.layout: Minimalist single-column form centered vertically. Left-aligned labels, 1pt precise borders on inputs, generous 16pt spacing between fields. Large sticky primary CTA at bottom wrapped in a KeyboardAvoidingView.

screens.name: Admin Dashboard
screens.purpose: High-level overview of field operations with stat cards and a live activity feed.

states.loading: Skeleton loader for stat cards and feed items.
states.empty: Illustration of a clipboard report with 'No recent activity yet'.
states.error: Error banner at the top with a 'Tap to retry' button.

screens.layout: Sticky glass header. Top section features a 2-col grid of quick stat cards (white surface, 1pt border). Below, a 'Live Activity Feed' structured as a vertical list with precise 1pt bottom borders separating rows. Left-aligned text.

screens.name: Admin Employee Management
screens.purpose: CRUD interface for managing field technicians.

states.loading: List skeleton with circular avatar placeholders.
states.empty: Illustration of a user icon with 'No employees found. Add one.'

screens.layout: List view of employees with initials inside circular brandTertiary avatars. Clean row structure with 1pt dividers. Floating Action Button (FAB) or top-right header button to 'Add Employee'.

screens.name: Admin Setup Management
screens.purpose: CRUD interface for customer garden setups and assignment.

states.empty: Illustration of plant seedling with 'No setups created yet.'

screens.layout: Cards displaying customer setups with 1pt borders. Include an assignment badge indicating the assigned employee. Action to create new setup via a bottom sheet.

screens.name: Admin Visit Detail
screens.purpose: Detailed view of a completed maintenance form and associated rating.

states.loading: Skeleton text blocks and square image placeholders.
states.error: Error loading visit details, with retry.

screens.layout: Read-only structured list mimicking the Employee form. Thick section dividers (4pt surfaceTertiary). Native square thumbnails for before/after photos. Left-aligned key-value pairs.

screens.name: Admin Reports
screens.purpose: Filter and export visit data to CSV/PDF.

states.empty: Clipboard illustration indicating 'Adjust filters to see reports.'

screens.layout: Chip/filter row at the top (date range, employee, setup, status) scrolling horizontally. Below, a summary of matching records. Sticky primary CTA at the bottom to 'Export to CSV/PDF'.

screens.name: Admin Notification Bell
screens.purpose: Real-time list of check-in/out and system alerts.

states.empty: Bell illustration 'You are all caught up.'

screens.layout: Full-screen list or large bottom sheet. Clean rows with unread badge indicators (small brandPrimary dot). 1pt dividers between items.

screens.name: Employee Home
screens.purpose: Today's assigned terrace/kitchen garden setups for the technician.

states.empty: Plant sprout illustration 'No setups assigned for today. Take a break!'

screens.layout: Clean card list. Each card shows customer name, location, and a prominent 'Check-In' button. Left-aligned content.

screens.name: Employee Visit Flow
screens.purpose: GPS check-in, detailed multi-section maintenance form, and checkout.

states.error: GPS error or form submission failure alerts.

screens.layout: Strict single-column stacking form. 16pt gap between fields. Thick dividers (4pt surfaceTertiary) separating sections (Weather, Plant Health, Watering, etc.). Native camera capture outputs square thumbnails in a horizontal scroll. Haptic feedback on toggles. Primary CTA sticky at the bottom.

dashboard_hero.alt: Rooftop terrace garden featuring potted plants and urban view

empty_state_setups.alt: Vibrant green seedlings sprouting from dark rich soil

instructions_to_main_agent: Adhere strictly to the 'Structural Minimalism' aesthetic: stark white backgrounds (surface: #FFFFFF), precise 1pt borders (border: #E5E7EB), and left-aligned text.
Do NOT use any shade of blue or purple. The primary accent is a vibrant organic green (#10B981) with dark green text on light surfaces (#064E3B). Info states should use gray (#6B7280).
Forms must use single-column stacking with labels above inputs and strict 16pt gaps. Use a 4pt thick divider (#F3F4F6) to separate major sections in the long maintenance form.
Implement haptics on all switches, toggles, and primary CTA presses as requested in the user prompt. Add to the haptics block for the dev agent.
Ensure touch targets are a minimum of 48x48pt padding out the internal space of Pressables if necessary.
Sticky primary actions (like 'Submit Report', 'Export') must reside in a fixed container at the bottom over the home indicator, protected by safe areas, with a frosted glass background.
Use Phosphor icons uniformly across the app for tabs, actions, and empty states. Do not mix icon families.
